programmes.show_description: Action thriller remake with Tom Berenger. A shipwrecked father and son wash up on an island only to discover they are on a hunting preserve owned by a merciless madman - and they're the prey.
Tense action with Michael Jai White. When a ruthless military assassin returns home from duty to find his brother brutally murdered, he sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and get revenge.
Horror Channel returns soon.

A woman is hospitalized for a month after being repeatedly stabbed during a heated argument with her ex-girlfriend's sister.
The Judge questions a pregnant woman's need to bring a concealed weapon to a meeting with her ex-girlfriend.
While riding her scooter with a dog on either side, a woman claims the yapping of a neighbour's small Shihpoo caused her to fall.
The Judge admonishes a young woman for sizing up a mechanic based on how nice he is; she sues him for allegedly substandard work, fraud and negligence.
A woman claims she was forced to move out of her boyfriend's home because of the constant harassment by two of his ex-wives.
When a man passes away, his family contests and nullifies his recent wedding and sues his partner for allegedly stolen property.
A businessman is left holding a 36-month lease when his assistant returns to her native country; a friend steps in but is sued for alleged car damage.
A landlord allegedly goes off on a frightened mother and child who quickly move out; the landlord claims they left lice and bedbugs behind.
Though they admit they love each other, a mother and daughter bring their grievances over a car sale to court.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
We examine the tragic case of Georgia Williams, a 17-year-old from Shropshire, who was murdered by Jamie Reynolds, a disturbed individual who meticulously planned her death.
We explore the murder of Emma Caldwell, a 27-year-old whose body was found in Limefield Woods in 2005. Iain Packer, a sign installer with a violent past, evaded justice for years.
One woman, two husbands dead under strange circumstances - could she be that unlucky? Correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates.
A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi.
In 1993, Florida was known for attacks on tourists. An injury to a victim, a bite mark, would be a key piece of evidence used to convict a determinedly uncooperative suspect.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Alex is grievously wounded at Kim and Phil's wedding.
Remake of the 1976 action thriller, with Ethan Hawke. A sergeant must protect cops and prisoners when his station is besieged by a corrupt policeman and his crew on New Year's Eve.
Thriller with Jackie Chan. A former Vietnam War special ops soldier now running a Chinese restaurant in London seeks revenge against a terrorist group responsible for the death of his daughter.
Tense thriller with Tom Berenger. A reclusive Vietnam veteran has his life turned upside down when he finds a dead woman and a bag of money while hunting in the snowy outback of Northern Maine.
Historical action adventure. In 11th century Britain, a mysterious stranger known as Shadow Walker attempts to turn a group of farmers into ruthless killers capable of overthrowing a tyrant.

With her five-year-old in the car, a woman is in hot pursuit of a vehicle she's determined to repossess; she winds up being arrested for breaching the peace.
A man denies accusations that he was in prison but confesses that he never completed repairs after receiving money to do so.
When a young woman is accused of stealing money from her mother's ex-boyfriend, she throws out wild allegations against him.
When a rent-control tenant goes up against a large property owner and loses, he seeks damages from his allegedly illegal tenant.
A German Shepard escapes a leash and attacks a woman and her small dog who claim they are scarred for life.
Two men, over twenty years apart in age, fight over alleged loans after meeting on an internet dating site.
A man on total disability from a car accident sues his former friend for a mortgage loan and the cost of a vacation; his friend claims he drinks too much.
A woman claims she was forced to move out of her boyfriend's home because of the constant harassment by two of his ex-wives.
When a man passes away, his family contests and nullifies his recent wedding and sues his partner for allegedly stolen property.

Nicki Myers Bates was just seven years old in 2006 when her mother vanished and the man her mum lived with told police he watched her die.
When Margaret McOnie is found dead on the cliff tops, a nationwide manhunt followed. Her murderer would soon be revealed as a deadly conman and a double murderer.
In 2014, 18-year-old UK college student Jamil Palmer was found fatally stabbed in Crane Park, Hounslow. He had suffered three stab wounds, one of which pierced his heart.
In 1993, Stephen Lawrence was attacked and stabbed twice by a group whilst waiting for a bus with his friend in London, UK, in a racially motivated attack.

After he's suspended for fixing races, a washed-up jockey's wish to become a giant in his profession has repercussions he may regret. Guest starring Mickey Rooney.
A vindictive wind-up talking doll takes revenge on an abusive stepfather who tries his best to destroy it.
Thriller with Denzel Washington. A CIA agent sent to question a rogue operative arrested for betraying the agency has to protect the prisoner from mercenaries - and resist his mind games.
Action adventure with Dwayne Johnson. After a decade in prison, a criminal sets out to avenge the murder of his brother - while being pursued by a cop and a ruthless hitman.
